Taste · Access · Discretion

Built around taste, access, and discretion, Avara Concierge connects clients and partners to the experiences that define modern luxury. From private dinners and late-night tables to travel planning and exclusive collaborations, we curate moments designed to feel effortless, elevated, and memorable.

One request. One point of contact. Every detail considered before you arrive.

Curated Services

Six disciplines, one standard. Tell us the occasion. We handle the rest quietly.

Dining Concierge

Reservations, private dining, tasting menus, birthday dinners, anniversary nights, and premium restaurant recommendations.

Private Celebrations

Brand Partnerships

Content collaborations, venue features, social promotion, lifestyle campaigns, and curated partner placements.

Lifestyle Requests

The Process

How Access Works

I

Submit a Request

Tell us the city, occasion, date, group size, and type of experience you want.

II

We Curate the Options

Our team recommends venues, experiences, and arrangements that match the desired style, budget, and atmosphere.

III

Experience It

Once confirmed, we coordinate the details so the experience feels seamless from start to finish.

Ready When You Are

Tell us the occasion.
We arrange the rest.

For Venues & Brands

Partner With Avara Concierge

We collaborate with select venues and premium brands looking to reach a luxury lifestyle audience.

The Collaboration

The Right Crowd, Introduced Quietly

Through curated features, social promotion, recommendations, and preferred partner placement, we help connect standout experiences with the right crowd. Placement is selective by design: the network only works if every name in it belongs there.

Apply as a Partner

What Partners Receive

Four Ways We Work Together

Curated Features

Your venue or brand presented within our lifestyle curation, in the right context.

Social Promotion

Placement across our social reach and lifestyle content, aligned to your positioning.

Preferred Placement

Priority within our recommendations when a client request matches your offering.

Audience Fit

Introductions to a young, high-spend, experience-driven audience that values quality.

Selective by Design

Think your venue belongs here?
We would like to hear from you.

Apply as a Partner Contact

The Agency

About Avara Concierge

Concierge, lifestyle media, and private experience curation. One agency, one standard.

A

Why We Exist

Avara Concierge was created for people who value access, atmosphere, and detail. We operate at the intersection of concierge, lifestyle media, and private experience curation, connecting clients, venues, and brands through a network built on taste, discretion, and modern luxury.

Whether arranging a dinner, planning a night out, curating a birthday, or building a brand partnership, our focus remains the same: make the experience feel seamless, elevated, and worth remembering.

Taste

We recommend what we would choose ourselves. Nothing makes the list by accident.

Access

Relationships across dining, nightlife, travel, and lifestyle open doors that stay closed to a cold call.

Discretion

Requests are handled privately. Who you are and what we arrange stays between us.

The best nights feel effortless.
That is the work.

Meet Us Properly

Start with a request,
or simply say hello.
